title: Ominous Phantoms
description: Ties Phantom spawning to Bad Omen instead of Insomnia and gives them new features.
body:
Ominous Phantoms changes the way Phantoms spawn; insomnia is no more! Now, if you try to sleep at night with the Bad Omen effect applied, it'll transform into Night Omen, which causes Phantoms to appear. The higher the level of Bad/Night Omen, the bigger the Phantoms.
# Configurable Features
## Picky Phantoms
Phantoms only attack players with the Night Omen effect.
## Bony Phantoms
Phantoms have a chance of dropping bones on top of their standard loot table.
## Mending Membranes
Phantom Membranes can be used to repair any damaged item in the crafting grid.
## Dungeon Bottles
Ominous Bottles can be found in Dungeon chests.
